## Bison Mosey And March In Yellowstone’s Spring Snow

What kind of weather do you think is perfect for a leisurely walk outdoors? Well, for a herd of bison in Yellowstone National Park, heavy spring snow in Mammoth, Wyoming, seemed to be the perfect. Enjoy this video of them marching and moseying along.
